---
title: "National MSP plan maps"
---

## Contents

- [Netherlands](policy_makers_msp_zoning_NL.qmd)
- [Germany](policy_makers_msp_zoning_GE.qmd)
- [Belgium](policy_makers_msp_zoning_BE.qmd)
- [Denmark](policy_makers_msp_zoning_DK.qmd)
- [Norway](policy_makers_msp_zoning_NO.qmd)
- [England](policy_makers_msp_zoning_EN.qmd)
- [France](policy_makers_msp_zoning_FR.qmd)
- [Sweden](policy_makers_msp_zoning_SE.qmd)
- [Scotland](policy_makers_msp_zoning_SC.qmd)
- [Ireland](policy_makers_msp_zoning_IE.qmd)
